name: Big Boy Strawberry Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and 1 cup water in a saucepan; bring to boil.
2. Stir in the paste of cornstarch and 1/2 cup water.
3. Bring to boil gently until clear and thick.
4. Stir in strawberry gelatin.
5. Cool slightly.
6. Arrange strawberries in the shell or fold them into the cooled mixture, then pour all into the pie shell.
7. Chill and serve with whipped cream.
8. May substitute raspberries and raspberry gelatin instead.
